name: cherrystone/membership-tier-matrix
title: Membership Tier Matrix
description: Comparison matrix showcasing membership levels, fees, commitments, and syndicate benefits.

lede.default: Select the participation level that aligns with your investment strategy and availability.

default.name: Individual Angel
default.benefits: Full voting rights, access to Dealum platform, invites to all Providence Pitch Nights, co-investment rights.

default.name: Syndicate Partner
default.benefits: All Angel benefits, corporate branding on Cherrystone site, priority access to screening dealflow, shared diligence materials.
